hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'case "{}" in *.py) if command -v uv >/dev/null && [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "{}" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v ruff >/dev/null; then ruff check --fix --quiet "{}" 2>/dev/null; fi ;; *.js|*.ts|*.jsx|*.tsx) pnpm exec prettier --write "{}" 2>/dev/null ;; esac' || true
